| Data | `LAYER_DATA.md` | DynamoDB (sessions, eval), S3 (docs, artifacts), OpenSearch Serverless |
| Backend (Lambda) | `LAYER_BACKEND_LAMBDA.md` | Agent Lambda, ingestion Lambda, eval runner |
| Backend (ECS) | `LAYER_BACKEND_ECS.md` | Long-running multi-agent research (>15min) |
| API | `LAYER_API.md` | API Gateway REST + Cognito auth |
| Frontend | `LAYER_FRONTEND.md` | React SPA + CloudFront + S3 + WAF |
| Observability | `LAYER_OBSERVABILITY.md` | CloudWatch dashboards, X-Ray, SNS alerts |
| CICD | `CICD_PIPELINE_STAGES.md` | 10-stage CodePipeline (dev→staging→prod) |
| LLMOps | `LLMOPS_BEDROCK.md` | Bedrock Knowledge Base, Guardrails, Titan Embed V2 |
| Strands Runtime | `STRANDS_AGENT_RUNTIME.md` | Strands SDK agent, 7 custom @tools, multi-agent |
| Strands AgentCore | `STRANDS_AGENTCORE_DEPLOY.md` | AgentCore Gateway (MCP+OAuth2), Memory (STM+LTM) |
| Strands Frontend | `STRANDS_AGENT_FRONTEND.md` | WebSocket API GW v2 streaming, React chat UI |
| Strands Eval | `STRANDS_AGENT_EVAL.md` | Golden dataset eval, LLM judge, CICD quality gate |

## 3. Data Stores

| Store | Technology | Purpose | Encryption |
|-------|-----------|---------|------------|
| Agent Sessions | DynamoDB | Conversation history, turns, TTL 24h | KMS CMK |
| WS Connections | DynamoDB | WebSocket connection management | KMS CMK |
| Eval Results | DynamoDB | Eval scores, trends, regression data | KMS CMK |
| Documents | S3 | Uploaded docs (PDF, DOCX, TXT, HTML) | KMS CMK |
| Agent Artifacts | S3 | Tool outputs, research reports, traces | KMS CMK |
| Eval Datasets | S3 | Golden test datasets (versioned) | KMS CMK |
| Vector Store | OpenSearch Serverless | Titan Embed V2 vectors for RAG | KMS CMK |
| Knowledge Base | Bedrock Knowledge Bases | RAG retrieval over document corpus | Managed |

---

## 4. API Endpoints

| Method | Path | Auth | Handler | Description |
|--------|------|------|---------|-------------|
| POST | /agent/invoke | Cognito | StrandsAgent | Non-streaming agent invocation |
| GET | /agent/sessions | Cognito | SessionMgmt | List user sessions |
| GET | /agent/sessions/{id} | Cognito | SessionMgmt | Get session history |
| DELETE | /agent/sessions/{id} | Cognito | SessionMgmt | Delete session |
| POST | /documents/upload | Cognito | DocumentIngestion | Upload document for KB |
| WSS | $connect | Query token | WSConnect | WebSocket connect |
| WSS | $default | N/A | WSMessage | WebSocket message (agent invoke) |
| WSS | $disconnect | N/A | WSDisconnect | WebSocket disconnect |

---

## 5. Multi-Agent Architecture

| Agent | Model | Role | Tools |
|-------|-------|------|-------|
| Supervisor | Claude Sonnet 4.5 | Routes complex queries to specialists | ask_deep_research, ask_summarizer, ask_fact_checker |
| Deep Research | Claude Sonnet 4.5 | Multi-hop retrieval across KB collections | search_knowledge_base, web_search |
| Summarization | Claude Haiku | Condenses findings into executive summaries | summarize_document |
| Fact-Check | Claude Sonnet 4.5 | Cross-references claims, flags contradictions | search_knowledge_base, cite_sources |

---

## 6. Environments

| Resource | Dev | Staging | Prod |
|----------|-----|---------|------|
| Lambda Memory | 512MB | 1024MB | 1024MB |
| ECS Fargate | 1 task (1vCPU/2GB) | 1 task | 2 tasks |
| OpenSearch OCU | 2 min | 2 min | 4 min |
| WAF | Count mode | Block mode | Block + rate limit |
| Cognito MFA | Optional | Optional | Required |
| Guardrails | Log only | Block | Block |
| Deletion Policy | DESTROY | SNAPSHOT | RETAIN |
| Eval Gate | Skip | Warn only | Block deploy |

---

## 7. CICD Pipeline Stages

1. Source (GitHub webhook)
2. Build (pip install, pytest, bandit, cdk synth)
3. Dev Deploy (auto-deploy + smoke tests)
4. Agent Eval Dev (golden dataset, warn on regression)
5. Integration Tests (API + WebSocket tests)
6. Staging Deploy (auto-deploy)
7. Agent Eval Gate (block if score < 0.85)
8. Manual Approval (email to tech lead)
9. Production Deploy (CloudWatch alarm rollback)
10. Prod Smoke Tests (health check + basic agent invoke)
